headline: Is Tyler Technologies, Inc. (TYL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TYL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Tyler Technologies, Inc. on Andvari’s Substack by Douglas Ott. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TYL. Tyler Technologies, Inc.’s share was trading at $345.93 as of April 20th. TYL’s trailing and forward P/E were 48.05 and 27.55 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Tyler […]

headline: Evaluating Tyler Technologies (TYL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Tyler Technologies: Event Context and Recent Share Performance Tyler Technologies (TYL) has drawn investor attention after recent trading, with the share price at $342.03 and returns showing a modest gain over the past month, but a sharper decline across the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Tyler Technologies. Zooming out, the recent 1 day share price gain comes after a 30 day share price return of 3.19%.
